user_prompt: Help me a startup the Contemptor Dreadnought
prayer:
Approach the Contemptor Dreadnought with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Awakening to stir its ancient Machine Spirit.
Anoint the sarcophagus seals of the Contemptor Dreadnought with sacred unguents, beseeching the Omnissiah's grace.
Initiate the startup rite through sanctified cogitator linkages, invoking the Motive Force upon its dread frame.
Chant diagnostic litanies as the Contemptor Dreadnought's reactors hum to life, honoring its wrathful spirit.
Verify alignment of servos and auspex arrays, lest corruption taint the noble Contemptor Dreadnought.

user_prompt: Prepare the eradication beamer for maintenance
prayer:
Present the eradication beamer before the altar of maintenance, whispering binaric absolutions to appease its Machine Spirit.
Disengage power feeds with ritual precision, anointing emitters of the eradication beamer with blessed oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah during the maintenance cycle, purging flux residues from its sacred focusing crystals.
Scrutinize warp-conduits of the eradication beamer through noospheric scans, sanctifying each conduit found pure.
Seal the rite with incense fumigation, ensuring the eradication beamer stands ready for holy annihilation.

Test field coherence with auspex probes, reaffirming the conversion field's integrity against entropy.
Conclude with binary hymns, binding the conversion field in eternal service to the Machine God.

Seal the radium carbine in stasis wards, its fury banked until the next call to purge the unclean.
